1. Aries - 8/10 - Natural-born leaders, Aries are confident and adventurous, but can be impulsive and reckless.
2. Taurus - 7/10 - Reliable and practical, Tauruses value stability and security, but can be stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis are curious and love to learn, but can be scatterbrained and inconsistent.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Emotional and nurturing, Cancers care deeply about others, but can be moody and overly sensitive.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos are natural performers, but can be prideful and dominating.
6. Virgo - 7/10 - Analytical and hardworking, Virgos are meticulous and detail-oriented, but can be critical and perfectionistic.
7. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and social, Librans value harmony and balance, but can be indecisive and overly concerned with appearances.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios are private and perceptive, but can be secretive and controlling.
9. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians are freedom-loving and independent, but can be reckless and blunt.
10. Capricorn - 6/10 - Disciplined and responsible, Capricorns value tradition and authority, but can be pessimistic and overly critical.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and innovative, Aquarians are unconventional and freedom-loving, but can be aloof and detached.
12. Pisces - 7/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, Pisces are dreamy and artistic, but can be impractical and spaced-out.
